dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses band-based trading with Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_middle, bb_lower). Entry conditions: close above upper band (long) or close below lower band (short). Exit conditions: close below/above middle band (band center/moving average). Band parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT are not explicitly configurable in the JSON rule—standard Bollinger Band settings (typically 20-period SMA with 2 standard deviations) are assumed. Risk is defined by band width (bb_bandwidth) which varies daily. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the signal automatically reverses between long and short based on price action relative to bands.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses band-based trading with Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_middle, bb_lower). Entry conditions: close above upper band (long) or close below lower band (short). Exit conditions: close below/above middle band (band center/moving average). Band parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT are not explicitly configurable in the JSON rule—standard Bollinger Band settings (typically 20-period SMA with 2 standard deviations) are assumed. Risk is defined by band width (bb_bandwidth) which varies daily. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the signal automatically reverses between long and short based on price action relative to bands.

source_rule_text: Buy when prices close above the upper band; sell short when prices close below the lower band. Exit longs when prices close below the moving average (band center).
